endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis
endpoints.description: ListApis returns matching APIs.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis
endpoints.description: CreateApi creates a specified API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}
endpoints.description: GetApi returns a specified API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}
endpoints.description:
DeleteApi removes a specified API and all of the resources that it
 owns.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}
endpoints.description: UpdateApi can be used to modify a specified API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments
endpoints.description: ListApiDeployments returns matching deployments.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments
endpoints.description: CreateApiDeployment creates a specified deployment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: GetApiDeployment returns a specified deployment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description:
DeleteApiDeployment removes a specified deployment, all revisions, and all
 child resources (e.g. artifacts).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: UpdateApiDeployment can be used to modify a specified deployment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}:deleteRevision
endpoints.description: DeleteApiDeploymentRevision deletes a revision of a deployment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}:listRevisions
endpoints.description:
ListApiDeploymentRevisions lists all revisions of a deployment.
 Revisions are returned in descending order of revision creation time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}:rollback
endpoints.description:
RollbackApiDeployment sets the current revision to a specified prior
 revision. Note that this creates a new revision with a new revision ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/deployments/{deployment}:tagRevision
endpoints.description:
TagApiDeploymentRevision adds a tag to a specified revision of a
 deployment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions
endpoints.description: ListApiVersions returns matching versions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions
endpoints.description: CreateApiVersion creates a specified version.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}
endpoints.description: GetApiVersion returns a specified version.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}
endpoints.description:
DeleteApiVersion removes a specified version and all of the resources that
 it owns.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}
endpoints.description: UpdateApiVersion can be used to modify a specified version.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs
endpoints.description: ListApiSpecs returns matching specs.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs
endpoints.description: CreateApiSpec creates a specified spec.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}
endpoints.description: GetApiSpec returns a specified spec.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}
endpoints.description:
DeleteApiSpec removes a specified spec, all revisions, and all child
 resources (e.g. artifacts).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}
endpoints.description: UpdateApiSpec can be used to modify a specified spec.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}:deleteRevision
endpoints.description: DeleteApiSpecRevision deletes a revision of a spec.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}:getContents
endpoints.description:
GetApiSpecContents returns the contents of a specified spec.
 If specs are stored with GZip compression, the default behavior
 is to return the spec uncompressed (the mime_type response field
 indicates the exact format returned).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}:listRevisions
endpoints.description:
ListApiSpecRevisions lists all revisions of a spec.
 Revisions are returned in descending order of revision creation time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}:rollback
endpoints.description:
RollbackApiSpec sets the current revision to a specified prior revision.
 Note that this creates a new revision with a new revision ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/projects/{project}/locations/{location}/apis/{api}/versions/{version}/specs/{spec}:tagRevision
endpoints.description: TagApiSpecRevision adds a tag to a specified revision of a spec.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{SPEC}} with a real spec. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.
